project_description: Brainstorm, plan and advise on the upcoming 6-months social media strategy

organization.name: Green Hour Foundation
organization.description: We only have one planet. It is up to us to do what we can to protect it. With this in mind, Green Hour was established in 2018 to raise the awareness in the community of the importance of environmental protection. With over 80 cleanups organised, 100+ weekly Bun Run's fighting food waste, as well as school and corporate partnerships, Green Hour continues to make a growing positive impact in Hong Kong.

what_we_need: Join us for a 30 minutes call to learn more about our organization and our social media / marketing objectives
Help us with reviewing current content and advising us on how to better create brand awareness, engagement with target audience on Instagram
Compile a milestone / strategy plan for 6 months (no implementation needed)
Liaise with the team weekly for updates and questions from the team
project_details.background: We are launching a variety of new projects and we need to build a social media plan and schedule of posts.
project_details.what_we_have: Current basic design guidelineExample of previous marketing and design contents can be found on Instagram and we will provide more
project_details.why_important: As we grow, we would like to set a plan to ensure consistency across different social media platforms, allowing us to raise awareness of our community.
